reference: I have a lump on my bikini line next to my vagina. It doesn't hurt, but it is a hard lump. There is no head to squeeze, but when I have stretched the skin slightly, it looks almost purple under the skin. There isn't hair that grows there, so it can't be an ingrown hair. It's been there for one-two months now. Any ideas?
text: I have a lump on my bikini line next to my vagina. It doesn't hurt, but it is a hard lump. There is no head to squeeze, but when I have stretched slightly, it looks almost purple under the skin. There is a hair that grows there, so it can't be an ingrown hair. It's been there for one, two months now. Any ideas?
